creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #3)
> Mmm, There's something fishy, yes, I'll have to look a bit more.
> 
> On the other hand, all your packages are saved in the work/pkg directory for
> each port.

Well, I should say created, not saved.  They are then copied to the PACKAGES directory if it exists
